comments.body:
Man I hate selinux, how can it be that this is causing denials now with this change while the same thing works in the new Ci just fine...
And how does this only fail on rawhide

```
denied  { read } for  pid=211605 comm="sh" path="/lib/ld-musl-x86_64.so.1" dev="tmpfs" ino=34824 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c790,c958 tcontext=system_u:object_r:unlabeled_t:s0 tclass=file permissive=0
denied  { read } for  pid=211605 comm="sh" path="/bin/busybox" dev="tmpfs" ino=34593 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c790,c958 tcontext=system_u:object_r:unlabeled_t:s0 tclass=file permissive=0
```
Added two more commits and dropped the non passing one
